Cell.Data: What game did you organize the practice session? (e.g. December 2025)
What Style did you practice at this session? (if the session was for multiple styles, please make multiple entries)
What ooc rules did you review in this session?

Please list the participants in this format. Character Name (as listed on character sheet) - Player name (as listed on character sheet).
Example Gaeden - Scott Ross Atticus - Matt Salus

Charging -- including charging between gaps. (pg. 352), Use of the Caution keyword. (pg. 339), The Flurry Rule. (pg. 350), Parry, Dodge, Willpower, Magic Resist, and Physical Resist. (pg. 335), Roleplaying your damage and acknowledging successful attacks (pg. 325)
